title: Cold Start Mitigation for Serverless LLMs

questions.question: Roughly how long does a cold start typically take for a 70B model on a fresh node without mitigations?
Which AWS-side feature does the lesson recommend for pre-seeding container images so step-2 image pull disappears?
options: Bottlerocket dual-volume architecture referenced from EC2NodeClass

questions.question: Which Modal feature provides the closest thing to a "warm GPU boot in seconds" by deserializing post-load state directly into HBM?
Why does live migration transfer input tokens rather than KV cache between nodes?
options: Recomputing KV on the destination is cheaper than transferring GB of KV cache over the network
KV cache is encrypted and cannot move
Live migration is required by GDPR

questions.question: Which serverless layer trades direct GPU cost for predictable readiness by keeping at least one replica live?
Why does the lesson say cold-start mitigation must be stacked across layers rather than picked as a single tool?
options: No single layer eliminates every step (node provision, image pull, weights load, engine init); stacking layers compresses each step
All five layers are bundled in vLLM
